title: Impact of Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA) on Individual and Community Assets Creation and their Sustainability in Selected Village of Prakasam District of Andhra Pradesh
abstract: The concept of employment and wages are as old as mankind in India. Once Lord Buddha said that men works to satisfy the primary or basic urges of hunger, thirst, and sex, as well as host of secondary wants and desires created by a commercial civilization. Employment wage complements rural India the right of work should therefore, be assured to all, as a pre-requisite for the good life. It is the duty of the sate to uphold justice, and provide for the material and spiritual welfare of its subjects and give structure and disciple to life. Wage employment is monetary compensation paid by an employer to an employee in exchange for work done. Payment may be calculated as a fixed amount for each task completed, or at an hourly or daily rate, or based on an easily measured quantity of work done...
